source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Restrained archive English UI with Japanese typography guidance for headings, search, records, table numerals, metadata, command palettes, and calm approval states.
layout: Quiet 8px product grids, leaf-vein texture bands, compact archive dashboards, metadata tables, structured navigation, restrained shadows, and 8px cards and controls.

prompts.label: Transparent beech leaf motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a beech leaf, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One complete European/American beech leaf, slender oval shape with gently pointed tip, smooth subtly wavy edge, delicate parallel veins, copper beech autumn color with smooth grey-brown vein shadows, muted green undertone near the stem and midrib, temperate forest botanical accuracy, natural matte leaf surface, no branch and no extra leaves.
Composition/framing: centered complete leaf cutout with generous padding on all sides; do not crop the leaf; show the stem and full blade.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves copper leaf color, grey-green undertones, fine vein texture, smooth leaf surface, and quiet archive calm.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no forest landscape, no decorative background, no second leaf, no insects, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Beech Leaf light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Beech Leaf", derived from the visible isolated beech leaf cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible quiet archive system.
Reference use: Use the visible beech leaf motif as the source of truth. Extract copper leaf surfaces, smooth grey-bark neutrals, green undertone along veins and stem, temperate forest page neutrals, soft botanical vein rhythm, and quiet archival material texture. The board must visibly respect these motif colors and textures.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Beech Leaf, Beech Leaf, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: copper beech leaf primary, green-vein undertone accents, smooth grey bark surfaces, temperate forest neutrals, warm paper background, graphite archive ink, muted bark borders, leaf-shadow data colors, quiet archive status accents. Use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from the motif.
Typography: quiet archive product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a restrained humanist sans / editorial serif pairing for archive headings and a Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, search, records, table numerals, and dense metadata. Include short Japanese labels such as 資料, 検索, 記録, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, line chart, stacked bar chart, archive table, metadata table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple restrained icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Style: premium product design system, quiet archive dashboard, warm off-white paper surfaces, copper leaf primary actions, grey-bark panels and borders, green-vein active navigation and status accents, subtle leaf-vein texture bands, compact data density, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no one-note beige palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Beech Leaf", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Beech Leaf dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Beech Leaf". It must feel like the same quiet archive system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible beech leaf motif and the visible light-mode board.
Reference use: Use the visible isolated beech leaf and light-mode board as references. Preserve copper leaf primary controls, green-vein navigation and status accents, smooth grey-bark panel language, temperate forest neutrals, leaf-vein texture bands, 8px radius language, compact dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, and English plus Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Beech Leaf, Dark Mode, Beech Leaf, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: deepest grey-bark archive background, warm bark-charcoal panels, copper beech primary, muted copper highlights, green-vein undertone accents, fog-grey text, smooth bark borders, temperate forest neutral dividers, and restrained status colors derived only from the motif.
Typography: quiet archive product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a restrained humanist sans / editorial serif pairing for archive headings and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, search, records, table numerals, and dense metadata. Include short Japanese labels such as 資料, 検索, 記録, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, line chart, stacked bar chart, archive table, metadata table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple restrained icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Visual details: dark background derived from the leaf's grey-green vein shadows and smooth bark neutrals, elevated panels in warm charcoal-grey, fog-grey foreground text, copper leaf primary actions, muted copper focus rings, green-vein active navigation and status accents, subtle leaf-vein overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Beech Leaf", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
